title: berkheya subulata
intro: Berkheya subulata is a shrub-like plant species belonging to the daisy family and is native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots and leaves, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Berkheya subulata include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms associated with various ailments, such as fever and infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
